# Purpose

The script contains several variations of the directive, but they are incorrectly formatted, which will result in syntax errors. The purpose of the `'use strict'` directive is to enable strict mode, which helps catch common coding errors and prevents the use of certain JavaScript features that are considered problematic. However, due to the incorrect syntax, this script does not successfully apply strict mode. The presence of comments and malformed code suggests that this file may be incomplete or corrupted.
